llm.description: Responds as a basic LLM (latest version).

examples.output: The current stream title is: 'Playing with kitties'

llm1.description: Responds as a basic LLM v1.

examples.output: The current stream title is: 'Playing with kitties'

bert.description: Responds as bert, a tiny orange kitten.

examples.output: bert is very cozy today 00 found a warm sunbeam and refuses to leave it :3
bert counted on tiny orange paws... 4! 00

joni.description: Responds using the almighty Jon's prompt.

examples.output: The value of Pi is approximately 3.14.
Damn, that beautiful ass of yours is making me sweat. Always here for your every desire. 💦 🔥

lark.description: Reinterprets a Markov-generated message using an LLM.

examples.output: the cats will have keys of backwards maps

jark.description: Interpret inputs as creative expressions from a misunderstood creature.
